# Lighting Score Template

> This document is the canonical bridge between **Musical Features → Show Design → DMX Execution**  
> It is designed to be:
> - partially auto-generated (features)
> - partially LLM-generated (design)
> - human-tunable (final polish)

---

# 1. Musical Features (AUTO-GENERATED)

## Metadata
- Song: <title>
- Artist: <artist>
- Duration: <mm:ss>
- BPM: <tempo>
- Time Signature: 4/4
- Key: <key>

## Energy Profile
- Mean: <value>
- Peak: <value>
- Trend: <low → high → plateau → release>
- Notable Peaks: <timestamps>
- Notable Dips: <timestamps>

## Structure
| Section | Time Range | Energy | Notes |
|--------|------------|--------|------|
| Intro | 0:00–0:30 | Low | Sparse, vocal-led |
| Verse | 0:30–1:00 | Mid | Groove establishes |
| Chorus | 1:00–1:30 | High | Full arrangement |

## Harmonic Summary
- Progression: <Am → F → C → G>
- Key Stability: <stable / modulating>
- Cadences: <V-I at timestamp>
- Tension Peaks: <bars or timestamps>

## Rhythmic Summary
- Pulse: <strong 4/4 / syncopated>
- Onset Density: <low / medium / high>
- Groove Type: <straight / swung / broken>

## Symbolic Summary
- Bass Behavior: <steady / walking / syncopated>
- Melody: <rising / falling / static>
- Texture: <staccato / sustained / arpeggiated>
- Density Trend: <increasing / constant>

---

# 6. Mapping Rules

- Bass → dimmer pulses
- Kick → accent
- Snare → secondary accent
- Density ↑ → speed ↑
- Sustained → hold color
- Chord change → color shift
- Rising melody → tilt up

---

# 7. Accents

| Time | Event | Action |
|------|------|--------|
| <t> | <event> | <action> |

---

# 8. Intensity Rules

- Max brightness: <value>
- Dimmer floor: <value>
- Movement scaling: low → slow, high → fast

<free notes>

- Avoid conflicting movement
